## Type of Change

<!-- Please check the relevant boxes -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / tool (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] CI / build changes

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] All CI checks pass (`ruff`, `pyright`, `pytest`, `bandit`).
- [ ] I have added tests that cover my changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (`README.md`, `PRD.md`, `ARCH.md`, etc.) if the product scope changed.
- [ ] My commits follow a clear, descriptive style.
- [ ] I have verified that no secrets or credentials are present in my changes.
